Usage: php alynt-backup-runner.php <health|run|list|cleanup-preview|cleanup|verify|inspect|fetch|stage-restore|restore-production-preflight|restore-production-create-pre-backup|restore-production-apply|restore-production-rollback|restore-dry-run|restore-apply> --config=/path/to/config.json [--format=json] [--package=/path/to/archive.tar.gz] [--package-id=package-id --folder-hash=hash --download-path=/path] [--restore-path=/path/to/restores] [--staged-path=/path/to/staged/package] [--scope=files-and-database] [--target-site=example.com] [--pre-restore-evidence=/path/to/evidence.json] [--create-pre-restore-backup=1] [--apply-report=/path/to/report.json] [--confirm-site=example.com] [--write-report=1] [--older-than-days=14] [--confirm=delete-local-artifacts|restore-staging-site|create-production-pre-restore-backup|restore-production-site|rollback-production-site]
